vehicle.label: Tiltrotor VTOL Hybrid
vehicle.desc: Fixed-wing VTOL with 2 tilting rotor nacelles, BVLOS long-range capable

parts.label: Center Fuselage Spine
parts.spec: CFRP box beam center fuselage, avionics bay, wing spar socket, front GPS boom mount, belly camera window

parts.label: Main Wing (2-piece)
parts.spec: Straight wing, 4S NACA 2412, dual 15mm CFRP spar, 900mm half-span, 160mm chord, 3-layer CFRP skin

parts.label: Nacelle Assembly x 2
parts.spec: Tilting nacelle assembly, 0-90deg tilt axis, 6309 bearing set, servo-driven worm gear, motor and ESC pocket

parts.label: Tilt Servo + Linkage x 2
parts.spec: 25kg-cm DS3218 servo per nacelle, titanium pushrod, dual ball joints, tilt range 0-93deg, crash-tolerant

parts.label: V-Tail x 2 (Ruddervator)
parts.spec: +-35deg V-tail ruddervator pair, MG996R servo each, 30deg dihedral, CFRP sandwich panel, hinge piano wire

parts.label: Landing Gear (Tri)
parts.spec: Tricycle landing gear, spring-steel skid arms, 55mm dia wheels, CG at 1/3 chord, 200mm wheelbase

parts.label: Battery Bay (Slide-In)
parts.spec: Belly slide-in battery bay, 6S 8000mAh Li-ion pack, Velcro + strap dual retention, CG position 28% MAC

parts.label: Payload Nose Bay
parts.spec: Interchangeable nose payload bay, Day/IR camera gimbal or survey sensor, 80x60x50mm, 300g payload limit

parts.label: Tilt-Axis Harness + Datum Service Bay
parts.spec: Tiltrotor integration_service module with tilt-axis harness_channel, slack_loop, interface_datum, service_hatch, connector keying, and nacelle-to-wing load-path inspection access

generated_parts.label: Center Fuselage Spine

verify.rule: All required fields and features are present.
Mass estimate within acceptable range.
All physical features are traceable to part_tree.
Interfaces are reciprocal and named.
Critical joints have visible locking/preload evidence.

risk.desc: Potential thermal stress on avionics bay due to heat dissipation.
risk.mit: Implement additional cooling measures if necessary.

risk.desc: Risk of electrical interference between avionics bay and nacelles.
risk.mit: Ensure proper shielding and grounding of cables.

risk.desc: Insufficient stiffness in rib stiffeners may affect structural integrity.
risk.mit: Review and possibly reinforce rib stiffeners.

risk.desc: Camera window may obstruct view if improperly positioned.
risk.mit: Adjust camera window position to ensure clear view.

risk.desc: Service access may be too small for maintenance tasks.
risk.mit: Increase size of service access if needed.

Heat dissipation from avionics bay to ambient

generated_parts.label: Main Wing (2-piece)
generated_parts.spec: Straight wing, 4S NACA 2412, dual 15mm CFRP spar, 900mm half-span, 160mm chord, 3-layer CFRP skin

requirements: Straight wing, 4S NACA 2412, dual 15mm CFRP spar, 900mm half-span, 160mm chord, 3-layer CFRP skin
Fixed-wing VTOL with 2 tilting rotor nacelles, BVLOS long-range capable
Wing spar carrying nacelle loads into fuselage spine; V-tail/ruddervator and landing gear attach structure

verify.rule: cad_brief.mass_est_g must be a numeric grams value, and verify must include a mass/budget check.
Each risk item needs: id, desc, mit
Training-quality rule: make part_tree children and geometry_ops mutually traceable by id/name.
name exact neighboring subsystem labels when they mate, and choose connection_type + DOF + clearance_mm + required_feature so the neighbor can declare the same joint family back.
critical joints need visible insert/washer/locking/preload evidence and torque_Nm or preload intent.

risk.desc: Potential thermal stress on wing skin due to sun exposure.
risk.mit: Implement heat dissipation strategies such as cooling fins or thermal insulation.

risk.desc: Risk of insufficient structural integrity if wing spar diameter is reduced.
risk.mit: Conduct finite element analysis to ensure the wing spar can withstand expected loads.

risk.desc: Difficulty in accessing motor and servo modules for maintenance.
risk.mit: Ensure access covers provide sufficient clearance and are easily removable.

risk.desc: Potential misalignment during assembly due to loose tolerances.
risk.mit: Specify tighter manufacturing tolerances and conduct quality inspections.

risk.desc: Risk of aerodynamic inefficiency if wing shape is not optimized.
risk.mit: Perform wind tunnel tests to refine wing shape and surface finish.

clamp landing gear mount to wing spar

Improve aerodynamics by refining wing shape and surface finish

risk.mit: Use precise alignment tools during assembly and ensure bolts are torqued to specification.
